intro: Sneak through every room, outsmart Granny, and unleash true feline mischief.
description:
The house is no longer peaceful — because you’re inside. In Evil Cat Simulator vs Granny, you become a mischievous and slightly evil cat determined to turn Granny’s quiet home into your personal playground. Explore every room, outsmart Granny, and unleash adorable chaos with no rules holding you back. Whether you prefer sneaky pranks or full-scale destruction, the house now belongs to you.

Features:
• Free exploration of Granny’s house, including hidden spots and high places
• Dozens of interactive objects to push, break, scratch, and knock over
• Stealth elements: hide under beds, behind doors, and escape when spotted
• Dynamic encounters with Granny throughout the house
• Multiple playstyles: relax, explore, prank, or create total disorder
• Light-hearted atmosphere mixed with playful rivalry

Evil Cat Simulator vs Granny is a fun and chaotic cat life adventure where freedom and instinct come first. Sneak, jump, scratch, and outsmart Granny as you transform her home into the ultimate feline playground. The world is in your paws — and mischief is only the beginning.
